patches.summary: Adds a standard meta envelope with freshness and notice fields to Trustpilot read commands.
patches.reason: First-usage testing showed agents need machine-readable source, freshness, and absence signals.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass.

patches.summary: Makes agent-bundle and top-recent fall through to live reads when auto mode finds no local reviews.
patches.reason: Fresh installs returned empty local payloads even though live Trustpilot data was available.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass.

patches.summary: Routes empty search-reviews terms to list mode instead of FTS5.
patches.reason: An empty quoted term crashed FTS5 and blocked using the command as a local review lister.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass.

patches.summary: Detects Trustpilot pagination cap responses and refuses degenerate cursor writes.
patches.reason: Cap-hit pages returned totalPages=0 and could poison resume state.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass.

patches.summary: Defaults auth login to Chrome harvest and separates unsupported filter 404s from stale build IDs.
patches.reason: First-use auth required a redundant flag, and unsupported filters produced misleading re-auth guidance.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass.

patches.summary: Adds doctor-tp for Trustpilot-specific cache health because generated doctor has no extension hook.
patches.reason: The generated doctor checks generic sync tables while this CLI stores reviews in tp_* tables.
patches.validated_outcome: Path 3 taken: doctor.go is sealed, so doctor-tp was added as a sibling command. go build ./... and go vet ./... pass.

patches.summary: Retries agent-browser once after connection-refused cold-start failures.
patches.reason: The first daemon-backed invocation could fail before agent-browser finished warming up.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass.

patches.summary: Adds notices for empty Trustpilot histogram, AI summary, and topic summary fields.
patches.reason: Agents need to distinguish genuine empty enrichment from parser or upstream drift.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass.

patches.summary: auth.go: change s.HarvestedAt.Add(15 * 60) to s.HarvestedAt.Add(15 * time.Minute) so freshUntil is a real 15-minute window instead of 900 nanoseconds.
patches.reason: Greptile P1 on PR #588: untyped 15*60 silently coerces to time.Duration(900) = 900ns. JSON freshUntil was essentially equal to harvestedAt.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass.

patches.summary: openTPStore opens SQLite with journal_mode(WAL) + busy_timeout(5000) + foreign_keys(1) DSN pragmas, matching store.OpenWithContext defaults.
patches.reason: Greptile P1 on PR #588: bare sql.Open with no pragmas means concurrent CLI invocations get immediate SQLITE_BUSY instead of waiting on writer locks.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass.

patches.summary: FetchSearch propagates url.Parse and http.NewRequestWithContext errors instead of discarding them with _.
patches.reason: Greptile P2 on PR #588: a malformed searchBuildID could nil-dereference on the next u.Query() or req.Header.Set call. FetchPage above already handles this correctly.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass.

patches.summary: top_recent and agent_bundle surface fetchBucket errors via NoticePartialFetchError instead of silently discarding them.
patches.reason: Greptile P1 on PR #588 (round 2): a mid-pagination error returned partial reviews labeled complete with exit code 0. The new notice lets agents detect incomplete data.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass; meta.notices includes partial_fetch_due_to_error when fetchBucket fails.
